list.name: run
list.label: Run
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "metrics", tag: "run_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics", start: -30d)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${run}" == "$__all" then true else contains(value: r.run_id, set: ${run:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["run_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "pts_per_window")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${run}" == "$__all" then true else contains(value: r.run_id, set: ${run:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["run_id", "device_id", "source"])
  |> last()
